$comment: Machine-readable layout + component contract for slidev-theme-tahta. Source of truth — AGENTS.md is generated from this (npm run docs). Consumed via slidev-theme-tahta/layouts.json.

themeConfig.description: Deck-level config set in the first slide's headmatter under themeConfig.

fields.name: variant
fields.description: Visual style; see variants.json. Defaults to editorial.

fields.name: accent
fields.description: Override the brand accent (any CSS color). The whole palette (tints, shades, chart series) derives from it.

fields.name: lang
fields.description: BCP-47 language tag, e.g. 'tr'. Drives correct locale casing on uppercase kickers (Turkish i→İ).

universal.description: Per-slide frontmatter available on every layout.

fields.name: bg
fields.description: Slide background. A generated (asset-free, accent-derived) background — mesh | aurora | grain | dots | grid — or an image path/URL, which is painted under an automatic contrast scrim. Opt-in; omit for the variant's default.

fields.name: glow
fields.description: Force the accent glow on (topic slides) or off (cover/section/statement).

fields.name: foot
fields.description: Override the auto footer label for this slide.

rules: Pick the layout that matches the content shape; fill its frontmatter fields. Do not write CSS, grids, or layout HTML.
Titles/subtitles may contain highlight. Nothing else needs HTML.
Footer label auto-fills from the deck title (override per slide with foot:). Never add page numbers.
Keep numeric values bare; put the symbol in unit (value: 80, unit: "%").
For cover/section/statement/end/fact, the title comes from frontmatter — leave the slide body empty.
Inside { ... } flow rows, quote any value containing a comma or colon (before: "$4,200").
ghost: (on default/section/stats/steps/fact) prints a faint giant background glyph.
Entrance motion is automatic, themeable per variant, and disabled in print + reduced-motion.

layouts.example: layout: cover kicker: Team · 2026 title: Shipping Faster subtitle: How we cut p95 80%

fields.name: index
fields.description: Big faint background glyph + small accent label.

layouts.example:
layout: section
index: "02"
kicker: Part two
title: The migration

layouts.useFor: General content; body is markdown (bullets, prose). Auto fit-to-frame.
layouts.example: layout: default kicker: The problem title: Slow far from us-east-1 --- - Average round trip was 220ms - p95 hit 480ms

layout: statement
kicker: The setup
title: Your dashboard says 42ms. Your angriest user waited 1.9s.

layout: quote
quote: It just feels instant now.
author: A beta user

layout: fact
kicker: The takeaway
value: "80"
unit: "%"
label: lower p95 worldwide

fields.name: columns
fields.description: Header labels; default [Metric, Before, After, Δ].

layouts.example:
layout: compare
kicker: Before vs after
title: Every metric moved
rows:
  - { metric: p95, before: 480ms, after: 95ms, delta: −80% }

layout: chart
kicker: Before vs after
title: Latency, drawn
chart:
  type: area
  unit: ms
  categories: [p50, p95, cold start]
  series:
    - { name: Before, data: [120, 480, 900] }
    - { name: After, data: [38, 95, 12] }

layout: steps
kicker: The migration
title: Incremental, zero downtime
steps:
  - { title: Extract, desc: pull handlers out, icon: "lucide:scissors" }

layout: feature
kicker: Why it works
title: Three reasons
features:
  - { icon: "lucide:zap", title: Fast, desc: Edge in 300+ locations }

layout: timeline
kicker: Roadmap
title: Next quarters
events:
  - { date: Q3, title: Alerts, desc: anomaly detection }

layout: logos
kicker: Trusted by
title: Teams on the edge
logos:
  - { icon: "lucide:cloud", text: Northwind }

layouts.useFor: Code, optionally Magic Move. Body is a fenced code block.
layouts.example:
layout: code
kicker: How it works
title: Cache, then render
---

````md magic-move
```js
const x = await get(url)
```
```js
const x = await cache.match(url) ?? get(url)
```
````

layouts.useFor: Generic split; left = body, right = after ::right::.
layouts.example:
layout: two-cols
title: Before vs after
---

**Before** — one region.

::right::

**After** — 18 regions.

layouts.useFor: Text + a side image (markdown body is the text column).

fields.name: image
fields.description: Path in the deck's public/ folder, e.g. /shot.png.

layouts.example:
layout: image
side: right
image: /shot.png
title: The product
---

- A media column plus a text column
layout: showcase side: right image: /shot.png kicker: The product title: Finally visible subtitle: One line of config.

layouts.useFor: Full-bleed image hero with overlaid text.

fields.name: duotone
fields.description: Grayscale + accent duotone the image (default true).

layouts.example:
layout: bleed
image: /cover.jpg
duotone: true
kicker: Results
stat: "−80%"
title: p95 latency, worldwide

layout: embed
title: Demo
video: /demo.mp4

layout: end
title: Thanks
subtitle: Questions welcome
contact: team@example.com

components.name: Stat
components.example: <Stat value="80" unit="%" label="lower p95" tone="good" icon="lucide:trending-down" />

components.name: Plot
components.useFor: ECharts chart (alias: BarChart). Used by the chart layout.

components.name: Callout
components.example: <Callout tone="warn" icon="lucide:triangle-alert">Heads up: this is the one risk.</Callout>

components.name: Reveal
components.useFor: Themeable entrance wrapper for extra body content.

components.name: Fit
components.useFor: Auto fit-to-frame: scales overflowing content down.
components.example: <Fit>long body content that should never overflow</Fit>
